message:
fix: register FTS5 virtual table on frankensqlite search connection (#26)

When FrankenSQLite opens a stock-SQLite database, it skips virtual table
entries (rootpage=0) during sqlite_master parsing.  The fts_messages FTS5
table is therefore not materialised in the in-memory schema, causing
"table not found: fts_messages" errors when workspace-filtered searches
fall back from tantivy to SQLite FTS.

Execute CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fts_messages immediately after
opening the search connection in sqlite_guard().  This triggers
FrankenSQLite's built-in FTS5 legacy fallback path, which materialises
the virtual table as a regular row table with the correct schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
